message:
fix(abi): remove 7 duplicate dlsym_passthrough (already native in pthread_abi/fortify_abi)

Remove duplicate dlsym_passthrough! calls for symbols already natively
implemented in their respective ABI modules:
- __pthread_cleanup_routine/register_cancel/defer/unregister/restore/unwind_next:
  native no-op stubs in pthread_abi.rs
- __syslog_chk: native variadic in fortify_abi.rs

GCT: 389→382, Implemented: 2003→2010

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
